overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a foggy rural road at night, approaching and passing an isolated wooden house with lit windows. A vehicle briefly passes by on the road. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog and low visibility, characteristic of a horror game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rural roadside approaching an isolated house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel road toward the house with glowing windows, surrounded by thick fog

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with warm glowing windows partially obscured by heavy fog
tall silhouetted tree standing beside the house
wooden power line pole visible in the distant fog
unpaved road surface stretching ahead into the fog
dark tree line barely visible through the mist in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy rural road at night, with the camera walking toward an isolated wooden house with lit windows. A large oak tree stands beside the house, and the surrounding area is sparsely vegetated with a distant forest barely visible through the heavy mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rural road with vehicle passing

events.description: vehicle headlights emerge from the fog in the distance on the right side of the road
vehicle passes by on the right, illuminating the fog with bright headlights before disappearing

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the road as a vehicle approaches from the distance and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: car with bright headlights approaching through the fog and passing by on the right side of the road

entered.detail: vehicle headlights visible as two bright points in the foggy distance

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking closer to the house, a vehicle's headlights appear in the foggy distance on the right. The vehicle approaches and passes by, briefly illuminating the scene with its headlights before disappearing. The house and tree grow larger as the camera nears them.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rural road passing the house, revealing dense forest

events.description: passing the house and tree, revealing more of the dense pine forest on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past the house and continuing along the foggy road into the forested area ahead

entered.detail: thick forest of pine trees becoming visible beyond the house as the camera passes

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the house and tree, which now recede into the left mid-ground. The surrounding dense pine forest becomes more visible through the fog as the walk continues along the gravel road into the darker wooded area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a foggy rural road that transitions from an approach toward a lonely dwelling into a descent into a dark, wooded forest. It begins with the camera moving through heavy mist toward an isolated wooden house with lit windows and a large oak tree standing beside it. As the camera draws closer, a vehicle's headlights emerge from the fog on the right, briefly illuminating the surroundings as the car passes by and disappears into the haze. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the house and tree, leaving them to recede into the left mid-ground. Finally, the path leads further along the gravel road, where the dense pine forest becomes more visible through the fog as the camera moves deeper into the dark woods.
